base_tile.source_sprite: 128x128 final PNG cell for floor tiles with transparent padding
base_tile.logical_model_tile: 64x48 art inside a 64x64 square canvas before nearest-neighbor 2x export

sprites.name: led_edge_pick_orange
sprites.note: Orange tile-edge highlight for selected rack picking zones only.

sprites.name: led_edge_delivery_green
sprites.note: Green permanent tile-edge highlight for delivery/truck drop-off zones.

sprites.name: led_edge_robot_route_cyan
sprites.note: Cyan tile-edge highlight for selected robot current tile and next navigation target.

sprites.name: led_edge_congestion_red
sprites.note: Red temporary tile-edge highlight for active congestion zones.

led_edge_meanings.led_edge_pick_orange: Orange edge only; shown for rack picking tiles only when that rack is selected.
led_edge_meanings.led_edge_delivery_green: Green edge only; persistent delivery/truck drop-off zone marker.
led_edge_meanings.led_edge_robot_route_cyan: Cyan edge only; selected robot current tile and next navigation target.
led_edge_meanings.led_edge_congestion_red: Red edge only; temporary active congestion zone marker until the blockage is resolved.
